Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER

Name: Total time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER grouped by case:BudgetNumber
